title: Lunch Box
description: Lunch Box is a mod that adds little starter kits called Lunch Boxes
body:
Lunch Box is a mod that adds little starter kits called Lunch Boxes.
Mainly used for servers because it's not obtainable in survival.

Green Lunch Box (Starter)
When right-clicked on a block the player gets these items:
Stone sword, Stone pickaxe, Stone axe, Stone shovel, Stone hoe, 32 bread, 8 Cooked porkchop, Bow, Fishing rod, Compass, 16 arrows, Shield, 32 Torches.

Red Lunch Box (Mid Game)
When right-clicked on a block the player gets these items:
Iron sword, Iron pickaxe, Iron axe, Iron shovel, Iron hoe, 64 Cooked beef, 16 Golden carrots, Bow, Fishing rod, Shield, 64 Torches, 64 Arrows.

Lunch boxes can only be obtained by commands or Creative.
If you want to get a lunch box you can also use the /Lunchbox Command if you have Operator.
